name: MiniMax Open Platform
description: Developer API for MiniMaxs abab / M1 LLMs, speech, image and video-01 models.

seo.title: MiniMax Open Platform — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: MiniMax Open Platform: Developer API for MiniMaxs abab / M1 LLMs, speech, image and video-01 models.

when_to_use: Accessing MiniMax's multimodal LLM API for text, audio, and video
Building AI applications with MiniMax's long-context models
Generating video content with MiniMax Hailuo API
Running cost-effective inference for Chinese AI applications

cons: Global availability and billing less smooth
Compliance posture less clear outside China
review.verdict: Worth a look for multimodal generation on budget if you can accept the rough-edged DX.
review.best_for: Developers experimenting with Chinese multimodal models on a budget
review.not_for: Regulated enterprises needing clear Western compliance posture
